text_block_list.text:
I drop by the cafeteria, only to hear what sounds
like a strange incantation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl umya unya n-nyuma?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You were so close this time! This is good progress!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Umya una ubyaaa? Sigh... Not again... I keep mixing up the words.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... There's going to be a vocal exam in
one of my classes soon...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But the song they're using for the test has a
section that goes really fast... It's very, very
difficult.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm here for, to accompany her for
some practice!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doto, let's give it another go, okay? Horsegirl Horsegirl
umya unya—3, 2, 1, fight!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Una numa ubya fight!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I really can't do this! I'm sorry for bothering
you with my problems, Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, this is no bother at all. My daily fortune
predicts a large helping of good luck if I lend
someone a hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Also, have you forgotten our bond? We're
partners in our eternal hunt for lucky items!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ngh, thank you... But, I don't think any more of
this will help much.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Is there anything I can do to improve my singing?
choice_data_list: You should try to find the fun in practicing.

Try fixing the root of the problem, rather than
sweating the details.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: F-fun? But how?

Since the goal is to practice singing, I invite the
two to karaoke.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that's an amazing idea! Let's have
ourselves a blast—I mean, a great practice
session!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... H-holding this microphone only makes me
more nervous.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hey, now. If singing alone is too scary, let's do a
duet! Now, where's that remote?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yikes, we both screwed up a lot of the lines!
This song is a tough one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But no one really cares so long as you sound like
you're having fun! When you smile, Fortune smiles
back!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ah, s-sorry. I g-got carried away after seeing you
have so much fun, Fukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, no, it's good that you're relaxed! Why not see
if this helps things? Three, two, one, go!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Horsegirl umya unya—3, 2, 1, flight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! That's the best one you've had yet! Well
done to you, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, thank you so much! It's all because of your
help, Fukukitaru!

Her nerves melting away, Meisho Doto breaks
into a smile. It looks like she has built a strong
bond with the good-natured Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: The root of the problem?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hrmm, I see what you mean! Fixing one line won't
fix the whole song, so this calls for divine
intervention! C'mon, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Huuuuh? W-wait a second!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come now, Doto, join me in prayer! Pour your
entire heart and soul into it. Leave no detail
unspoken!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My entire heart and soul?! Um, o-okay. I'm really nervous, so I might mess this up...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Unn—I mean—umm... Dear gods! Nngh, I um... I'd
wike to pway... forood luck?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This is... no good... I can't pray properly when I
get nervous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's settle down, okay? Deep breaths, deep
breaths. The gods are patient, so you can take
your time!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... Th-that's true... Breathe in... and out...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, o mighty... g-gods. I would like to sing
without slipping up on my lines.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I said it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Doto! Perhaps slowing down could
help with your singing too?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's give it a go! Don't worry, the gods are by
your side cheering you on!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Horsegirl... Horsegirl... Unya... Unya... Horsegirl Horsegirl unya
umya?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You're nearly there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Horsegirl Horsegirl umya unya...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I d-did it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That was terrific! Great job, Doto! Now we just
have to up the tempo one step at a time!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wooow... Thank you, gods! Thank you,
Fukukitaru!

Matikanefukukitaru sticks around until the very
end of their practice. It seems Meisho Doto has
been blessed with a very good friend.
